Conclusion: CiQi-Agent成功实现了对中国古瓷器的智能鉴定分析，通过多模态工具集成和专门数据集构建，在瓷器鉴定任务上达到了最先进的性能，有助于文化遗产的普及和专家鉴定辅助。

Abstract: The connoisseurship of antique Chinese porcelain demands extensive historical expertise, material understanding, and aesthetic sensitivity, making it difficult for non-specialists to engage. To democratize cultural-heritage understanding and assist expert connoisseurship, we introduce CiQi-Agent -- a domain-specific Porcelain Connoisseurship Agent for intelligent analysis of antique Chinese porcelain. CiQi-Agent supports multi-image porcelain inputs and enables vision tool invocation and multimodal retrieval-augmented generation, performing fine-grained connoisseurship analysis across six attributes: dynasty, reign period, kiln site, glaze color, decorative motif, and vessel shape. Beyond attribute classification, it captures subtle visual details, retrieves relevant domain knowledge, and integrates visual and textual evidence to produce coherent, explainable connoisseurship descriptions. To achieve this capability, we construct a large-scale, expert-annotated dataset CiQi-VQA, comprising 29,596 porcelain specimens, 51,553 images, and 557,940 visual question--answering pairs, and further establish a comprehensive benchmark CiQi-Bench aligned with the previously mentioned six attributes. CiQi-Agent is trained through supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, and a tool-augmented reasoning framework that integrates two categories of tools: a vision tool and multimodal retrieval tools. Experimental results show that CiQi-Agent (7B) outperforms all competitive open- and closed-source models across all six attributes on CiQi-Bench, achieving on average 12.2\% higher accuracy than GPT-5. The model and dataset have been released and are publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/SII-Monument-Valley/CiQi-VQA.

</details>


### [265] [INSID3: Training-Free In-Context Segmentation with DINOv3](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28480)
*Claudia Cuttano,Gabriele Trivigno,Christoph Reich,Daniel Cremers,Carlo Masone,Stefan Roth*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: INSID3是一种无需训练的方法，仅使用冻结的DINOv3特征进行上下文分割，在语义、部件和个性化分割任务上达到SOTA，参数量减少3倍且无需监督。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文分割方法要么需要微调基础模型（损害泛化能力），要么组合多个冻结模型（架构复杂且分割粒度固定）。本文探索是否能用单一自监督骨干同时支持语义匹配和分割，无需任何监督或辅助模型。

Method: 利用DINOv3的大规模密集自监督特征展现的空间结构和语义对应性，提出INSID3方法：直接从冻结的DINOv3特征中分割不同粒度的概念，仅需一个上下文示例，无需训练或监督。

Result: 在一次性语义分割、部件分割和个性化分割任务上达到最先进水平，mIoU提升+7.5%，参数量减少3倍，且无需掩码或类别级监督。

Conclusion: 单一自监督骨干（DINOv3）足以支持上下文分割任务，无需复杂架构或监督，为简洁有效的分割方法提供了新方向。

Abstract: In-context segmentation (ICS) aims to segment arbitrary concepts, e.g., objects, parts, or personalized instances, given one annotated visual examples. Existing work relies on (i) fine-tuning vision foundation models (VFMs), which improves in-domain results but harms generalization, or (ii) combines multiple frozen VFMs, which preserves generalization but yields architectural complexity and fixed segmentation granularities. We revisit ICS from a minimalist perspective and ask: Can a single self-supervised backbone support both semantic matching and segmentation, without any supervision or auxiliary models? We show that scaled-up dense self-supervised features from DINOv3 exhibit strong spatial structure and semantic correspondence. We introduce INSID3, a training-free approach that segments concepts at varying granularities only from frozen DINOv3 features, given an in-context example. INSID3 achieves state-of-the-art results across one-shot semantic, part, and personalized segmentation, outperforming previous work by +7.5 % mIoU, while using 3x fewer parameters and without any mask or category-level supervision. Code is available at https://github.com/visinf/INSID3 .

</details>


### [266] [ConceptWeaver: Weaving Disentangled Concepts with Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28493)
*Jintao Chen,Aiming Hao,Xiaoqing Chen,Chengyu Bai,Chubin Chen,Yanxun Li,Jiahong Wu,Xiangxiang Chu,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出ConceptWeaver框架，通过三阶段分析流模型生成过程，实现单样本概念解耦与定制化生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练的流模型擅长合成复杂场景，但缺乏从单样本真实世界源中解耦和定制其底层概念的机制。需要理解生成过程的内在阶段特性以实现精确的内容操控。

Method: 1. 引入差分探测技术分析概念token对速度场的时间影响；2. 发现生成过程分为蓝图阶段、实例化阶段和细化阶段三阶段；3. 提出ConceptWeaver框架，使用阶段感知优化策略从单张参考图像学习概念特定的语义偏移；4. 在推理时通过ConceptWeaver Guidance机制在适当阶段注入学习到的偏移。

Result: 大量实验验证ConceptWeaver能够实现高保真、组合式合成和编辑，表明理解和利用流模型内在的阶段特性是实现精确、多粒度内容操控的关键。

Conclusion: 流模型的生成过程具有内在的三阶段结构，其中实例化阶段是概念解耦和操作的最佳窗口。ConceptWeaver框架通过阶段感知的优化和指导机制，成功实现了单样本概念解耦和精确内容操控。

Abstract: Pre-trained flow-based models excel at synthesizing complex scenes yet lack a direct mechanism for disentangling and customizing their underlying concepts from one-shot real-world sources. To demystify this process, we first introduce a novel differential probing technique to isolate and analyze the influence of individual concept tokens on the velocity field over time. This investigation yields a critical insight: the generative process is not monolithic but unfolds in three distinct stages. An initial \textbf{Blueprint Stage} establishes low-frequency structure, followed by a pivotal \textbf{Instantiation Stage} where content concepts emerge with peak intensity and become naturally disentangled, creating an optimal window for manipulation. A final concept-insensitive refinement stage then synthesizes fine-grained details. Guided by this discovery, we propose \textbf{ConceptWeaver}, a framework for one-shot concept disentanglement. ConceptWeaver learns concept-specific semantic offsets from a single reference image using a stage-aware optimization strategy that aligns with the three-stage framework. These learned offsets are then deployed during inference via our novel ConceptWeaver Guidance (CWG) mechanism, which strategically injects them at the appropriate generative stage. Extensive experiments validate that ConceptWeaver enables high-fidelity, compositional synthesis and editing, demonstrating that understanding and leveraging the intrinsic, staged nature of flow models is key to unlocking precise, multi-granularity content manipulation.

</details>


### [267] [Bridging the Geometry Mismatch: Frequency-Aware Anisotropic Serialization for Thin-Structure SSMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28503)
*Jin Bai,Huiyao Zhang,Qi Wen,Ningyang Li,Shengyang Li,Atta ur Rahman,Xiaolin Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FGOS-Net 通过频率-几何解耦框架解决细长线性结构分割中的拓扑连接问题，利用频率对齐扫描和主动探测策略，在保持高计算效率的同时显著提升分割性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 细长线性结构的分割对拓扑连接性要求极高，局部小错误可能导致长程连接中断。现有状态空间模型（SSMs）的各向同性序列化（如光栅扫描）与目标的各向异性几何结构不匹配，导致状态传播跨越而非沿着结构轨迹。

Method: 1. 频率-几何解耦：将特征分解为稳定的拓扑载体和方向性高频带，利用高频带显式校正下采样引起的空间错位。2. 频率对齐扫描：将序列化提升为几何条件决策，保持方向一致的轨迹。3. 主动探测策略：选择性注入高频细节并抑制纹理模糊性。

Result: 在四个具有挑战性的基准测试中始终优于强基线。在DeepCrack上达到91.3% mIoU和97.1% clDice，运行速度80 FPS，仅需7.87 GFLOPs。

Conclusion: FGOS-Net通过频率-几何解耦有效解决了细长线性结构分割中的拓扑连接问题，实现了高精度和高效率的平衡，为各向异性目标的序列化建模提供了新思路。

Abstract: The segmentation of thin linear structures is inherently topology allowbreak-critical, where minor local errors can sever long-range connectivity. While recent State-Space Models (SSMs) offer efficient long-range modeling, their isotropic serialization (e.g., raster scanning) creates a geometry mismatch for anisotropic targets, causing state propagation across rather than along the structure trajectories. To address this, we propose FGOS-Net, a framework based on frequency allowbreak-geometric disentanglement. We first decompose features into a stable topology carrier and directional high-frequency bands, leveraging the latter to explicitly correct spatial misalignments induced by downsampling. Building on this calibrated topology, we introduce frequency-aligned scanning that elevates serialization to a geometry-conditioned decision, preserving direction-consistent traces. Coupled with an active probing strategy to selectively inject high-frequency details and suppress texture ambiguity, FGOS-Net consistently outperforms strong baselines across four challenging benchmarks. Notably, it achieves 91.3% mIoU and 97.1% clDice on DeepCrack while running at 80 FPS with only 7.87 GFLOPs.

</details>


### [268] [Generalizable Detection of AI Generated Images with Large Models and Fuzzy Decision Tree](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28508)
*Fei Wu,Guanghao Ding,Zijian Niu,Zhenrui Wang,Lei Yang,Zhuosheng Zhang,Shilin Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一个结合轻量级伪影感知检测器和多模态大语言模型的AI生成图像检测框架，通过模糊决策树实现语义和感知线索的自适应融合，达到最先进的检测精度和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI生成图像的恶意使用和广泛传播威胁数字内容的真实性。现有检测方法依赖生成管道中的低级伪影，但容易因模型特定过拟合而缺乏泛化能力。多模态大语言模型虽然具有高级语义推理和广泛泛化能力，但缺乏对细微生成伪影的感知敏感性，无法作为独立检测器。

Method: 提出新颖的AI生成图像检测框架，通过模糊决策树协同整合轻量级伪影感知检测器和多模态大语言模型。决策树将基础检测器的输出视为模糊隶属度值，实现从语义和感知视角自适应融合互补线索。

Result: 大量实验证明，该方法在多样生成模型上实现了最先进的检测精度和强大的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 通过模糊决策树整合伪影感知检测器和多模态大语言模型，有效解决了AI生成图像检测中的泛化问题和感知敏感性不足的问题，为数字内容真实性保护提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: The malicious use and widespread dissemination of AI-generated images pose a serious threat to the authenticity of digital content. Existing detection methods exploit low-level artifacts left by common manipulation steps within the generation pipeline, but they often lack generalization due to model-specific overfitting. Recently, researchers have resorted to Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for AIGC detection, leveraging their high-level semantic reasoning and broad generalization capabilities. While promising, MLLMs lack the fine-grained perceptual sensitivity to subtle generation artifacts, making them inadequate as standalone detectors. To address this issue, we propose a novel AI-generated image detection framework that synergistically integrates lightweight artifact-aware detectors with MLLMs via a fuzzy decision tree. The decision tree treats the outputs of basic detectors as fuzzy membership values, enabling adaptive fusion of complementary cues from semantic and perceptual perspectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and strong generalization across diverse generative models.

</details>


### [269] [GEditBench v2: A Human-Aligned Benchmark for General Image Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28547)
*Zhangqi Jiang,Zheng Sun,Xianfang Zeng,Yufeng Yang,Xuanyang Zhang,Yongliang Wu,Wei Cheng,Gang Yu,Xu Yang,Bihan Wen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GEditBench v2是一个包含1200个真实用户查询、涵盖23个任务的图像编辑评测基准，并提出了用于视觉一致性评估的开源模型PVC-Judge，在评测16个前沿编辑模型时展现了更好的人类对齐性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前图像编辑模型的评估框架落后：现有基准任务覆盖范围窄，标准指标无法充分捕捉编辑图像与原始图像之间的视觉一致性（包括身份、结构和语义连贯性的保持）。

Method: 1. 构建GEditBench v2基准，包含1200个真实世界用户查询，涵盖23个任务，包括专门用于无约束、分布外编辑指令的开放集类别。
2. 提出PVC-Judge开源成对评估模型，通过两个新颖的区域解耦偏好数据合成流程进行训练。
3. 构建VCReward-Bench，使用专家标注的偏好对来评估PVC-Judge在视觉一致性评估上与人类判断的对齐程度。

Result: 1. PVC-Judge在开源模型中达到最先进的评估性能，平均甚至超过GPT-5.1。
2. 通过对16个前沿编辑模型进行基准测试，显示GEditBench v2能够实现更符合人类判断的评估，揭示了当前模型的关键局限性。

Conclusion: GEditBench v2为推进精确图像编辑提供了可靠的评估基础，能够更全面地评估图像编辑模型的视觉一致性，并识别现有模型的不足之处。

Abstract: Recent advances in image editing have enabled models to handle complex instructions with impressive realism. However, existing evaluation frameworks lag behind: current benchmarks suffer from narrow task coverage, while standard metrics fail to adequately capture visual consistency, i.e., the preservation of identity, structure and semantic coherence between edited and original images. To address these limitations, we introduce GEditBench v2, a comprehensive benchmark with 1,200 real-world user queries spanning 23 tasks, including a dedicated open-set category for unconstrained, out-of-distribution editing instructions beyond predefined tasks. Furthermore, we propose PVC-Judge, an open-source pairwise assessment model for visual consistency, trained via two novel region-decoupled preference data synthesis pipelines. Besides, we construct VCReward-Bench using expert-annotated preference pairs to assess the alignment of PVC-Judge with human judgments on visual consistency evaluation. Experiments show that our PVC-Judge achieves state-of-the-art evaluation performance among open-source models and even surpasses GPT-5.1 on average. Finally, by benchmarking 16 frontier editing models, we show that GEditBench v2 enables more human-aligned evaluation, revealing critical limitations of current models, and providing a reliable foundation for advancing precise image editing.

</details>


### [270] [Seen2Scene: Completing Realistic 3D Scenes with Visibility-Guided Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28548)
*Quan Meng,Yujin Chen,Lei Li,Matthias Nießner,Angela Dai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Seen2Scene是首个基于流匹配的方法，直接在真实世界不完整3D扫描上训练，用于场景补全和生成。通过可见性引导的流匹配，掩码未知区域，有效从真实部分观测中学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖完整且通常是合成的3D数据，难以处理真实世界中不完整、有遮挡的3D扫描。需要一种能直接在真实、不完整扫描上学习的方法，以实现对复杂、杂乱真实环境的逼真场景补全。

Method: 1. 可见性引导的流匹配：显式掩码真实扫描中的未知区域，从部分观测中学习；2. 使用稀疏网格编码的TSDF体积表示3D场景；3. 采用稀疏Transformer高效建模复杂场景结构；4. 以3D布局框作为输入条件信号，可灵活适应文本或部分扫描等其他输入。

Result: 实验表明，Seen2Scene能生成连贯、完整且逼真的3D场景，在补全准确性和生成质量上优于基线方法。模型能有效处理复杂、杂乱的真实环境。

Conclusion: Seen2Scene首次实现了直接在真实世界不完整3D扫描上训练的流匹配方法，通过可见性引导的流匹配和稀疏Transformer架构，成功解决了从部分观测中学习场景补全和生成的挑战，为真实环境3D场景重建提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: We present Seen2Scene, the first flow matching-based approach that trains directly on incomplete, real-world 3D scans for scene completion and generation. Unlike prior methods that rely on complete and hence synthetic 3D data, our approach introduces visibility-guided flow matching, which explicitly masks out unknown regions in real scans, enabling effective learning from real-world, partial observations. We represent 3D scenes using truncated signed distance field (TSDF) volumes encoded in sparse grids and employ a sparse transformer to efficiently model complex scene structures while masking unknown regions. We employ 3D layout boxes as an input conditioning signal, and our approach is flexibly adapted to various other inputs such as text or partial scans. By learning directly from real-world, incomplete 3D scans, Seen2Scene enables realistic 3D scene completion for complex, cluttered real environments. Experiments demonstrate that our model produces coherent, complete, and realistic 3D scenes, outperforming baselines in completion accuracy and generation quality.

</details>


### [271] [MarkushGrapher-2: End-to-end Multimodal Recognition of Chemical Structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28550)
*Tim Strohmeyer,Lucas Morin,Gerhard Ingmar Meijer,Valéry Weber,Ahmed Nassar,Peter Staar*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MarkushGrapher-2：一种端到端的多模态化学结构识别方法，专门处理Markush结构，结合文本、图像和布局信息，显著优于现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前从文档中自动提取化学结构的方法在识别多模态描述的Markush结构时精度不足，无法用于大规模自动处理

Method: 1) 使用专用OCR模型从化学图像提取文本；2) 通过Vision-Text-Layout编码器和OCSR视觉编码器联合编码文本、图像和布局信息；3) 采用两阶段训练策略融合编码，自回归生成Markush结构表示；4) 构建大规模真实世界Markush结构数据集

Result: 方法在多模态Markush结构识别上大幅优于现有技术，同时在分子结构识别上保持强大性能；发布了IP5-M基准数据集和完整代码模型

Conclusion: MarkushGrapher-2有效解决了多模态化学结构识别难题，通过端到端方法和高质量数据集推动了该领域研究

Abstract: Automatically extracting chemical structures from documents is essential for the large-scale analysis of the literature in chemistry. Automatic pipelines have been developed to recognize molecules represented either in figures or in text independently. However, methods for recognizing chemical structures from multimodal descriptions (Markush structures) lag behind in precision and cannot be used for automatic large-scale processing. In this work, we present MarkushGrapher-2, an end-to-end approach for the multimodal recognition of chemical structures in documents. First, our method employs a dedicated OCR model to extract text from chemical images. Second, the text, image, and layout information are jointly encoded through a Vision-Text-Layout encoder and an Optical Chemical Structure Recognition vision encoder. Finally, the resulting encodings are effectively fused through a two-stage training strategy and used to auto-regressively generate a representation of the Markush structure. To address the lack of training data, we introduce an automatic pipeline for constructing a large-scale dataset of real-world Markush structures. In addition, we present IP5-M, a large manually-annotated benchmark of real-world Markush structures, designed to advance research on this challenging task. Extensive experiments show that our approach substantially outperforms state-of-the-art models in multimodal Markush structure recognition, while maintaining strong performance in molecule structure recognition. Code, models, and datasets are released publicly.

</details>


### [272] [Hydra: Unifying Document Retrieval and Generation in a Single Vision-Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28554)
*Athos Georgiou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Hydra提出了一种双头视觉语言模型，通过单个LoRA适配器实现检索和生成功能，无需独立模型，减少内存占用和系统复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的视觉文档理解需要独立的检索和生成模型，导致内存占用翻倍和系统复杂度增加。作者希望开发单一模型同时支持两种功能。

Method: 采用双头架构，使用单个LoRA适配器训练检索功能。推理时切换适配器：启用时产生多向量嵌入用于检索，禁用时恢复基础模型的生成质量。还提出了三项工程要求（注意力模式恢复、lm_head保留、KV缓存感知解码）确保生成质量。

Result: 在10,500个样本中生成输出与基础模型完全一致（字节级相同）。在四个VQA基准测试中，最大delta-ANLS仅为0.0044。内存占用减少41%，但适配器切换在并发服务时引入吞吐量开销。证明该方法可扩展到音频检索、视频嵌入和语音生成。

Conclusion: Hydra展示了单一视觉语言模型通过LoRA适配器切换同时支持检索和生成的可行性，显著减少资源需求，为多模态系统设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Visual document understanding typically requires separate retrieval and generation models, doubling memory and system complexity. We present Hydra, a dual-head approach that provides both ColBERT-style late-interaction retrieval and autoregressive generation from a single vision-language model (VLM). A single LoRA adapter, trained only for retrieval, is toggled at inference: enabling it produces multi-vector embeddings; disabling it recovers the base model's generation quality -- byte-identical outputs in 100% of 10,500 greedy and stochastic samples, with max delta-ANLS = 0.0044 across 15,301 samples on four VQA benchmarks (three informative; ChartQA is near-zero for both models under greedy decoding) when compared against an independent base-model pipeline. We identify three engineering requirements (attention-mode restoration, lm_head preservation, KV-cache-aware decoding) whose omission silently breaks generation despite correct weight recovery. On ViDoRe V1, Hydra (4B) is within 1 percentage point of a controlled single-head baseline in a single training run, with higher aggregate scores on V2 and V3 that are concentrated on a subset of tasks; multi-seed experiments are needed to confirm these trends. The single-model design reduces peak GPU memory by 41%, though adapter switching introduces throughput overhead under concurrent serving loads. An ablation shows that GritLM-style joint training provides no benefit within the LoRA-based (r=16) training regime. A proof-of-concept extension to Qwen2.5-Omni-3B demonstrates that the mechanism generalizes to audio retrieval and video embedding, with speech generation.

</details>


### [273] [Domain-Invariant Prompt Learning for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28555)
*Arsham Gholamzadeh Khoee,Yinan Yu,Robert Feldt*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DiCoOp扩展了CoOp，通过对抗训练学习领域不变提示，在领域泛化任务中表现优于CoOp


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的软提示方法（如CoOp）缺乏处理未见分布领域转移的显式机制，需要改进领域泛化能力

Method: 提出Domain-invariant Context Optimization (DiCoOp)，采用对抗训练方法，强制模型学习领域不变提示，同时保持分类判别能力

Result: DiCoOp在多种视觉领域的领域泛化任务中持续超越CoOp

Conclusion: DiCoOp通过对抗训练学习领域不变提示，有效提升了预训练视觉语言模型在领域泛化任务中的性能

Abstract: Large pre-trained vision-language models like CLIP have transformed computer vision by aligning images and text in a shared feature space, enabling robust zero-shot transfer via prompting. Soft-prompting, such as Context Optimization (CoOp), effectively adapts these models for downstream recognition tasks by learning a set of context vectors. However, CoOp lacks explicit mechanisms for handling domain shifts across unseen distributions. To address this, we propose Domain-invariant Context Optimization (DiCoOp), an extension of CoOp optimized for domain generalization. By employing an adversarial training approach, DiCoOp forces the model to learn domain-invariant prompts while preserving discriminative power for classification. Experimental results show that DiCoOp consistently surpasses CoOp in domain generalization tasks across diverse visual domains.

</details>


### [274] [Curriculum-Guided Myocardial Scar Segmentation for Ischemic and Non-ischemic Cardiomyopathy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28560)
*Nivetha Jayakumar,Jonathan Pan,Shuo Wang,Bishow Paudel,Nisha Hosadurg,Cristiane C. Singulane,Sivam Bhatt,Amit R. Patel,Miaomiao Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于课程学习的框架，通过渐进式训练策略从高置信度清晰疤痕区域逐步过渡到低置信度模糊样本，提升LGE-CMR图像中心肌疤痕分割的准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LGE-CMR图像中心肌疤痕的可靠分割面临挑战，包括患者间对比增强差异、对比剂洗脱等次优成像条件，以及弥漫性疤痕标注的观察者间差异。传统方法在这些困难条件下表现不佳。

Method: 采用课程学习框架，设计渐进式训练策略：从高置信度、清晰定义的疤痕区域开始训练，逐步引入低置信度或视觉模糊、疤痕负荷有限的样本，使网络对不确定标签和细微疤痕外观更具鲁棒性。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法提升了分割准确性和一致性，特别是在最小或弥漫性疤痕病例中表现优于标准训练基线，为临床应用中利用不完美数据改进心肌疤痕量化提供了原则性方法。

Conclusion: 课程学习框架为LGE-CMR图像中心肌疤痕分割提供了一种有效方法，能够处理标注不确定性和视觉模糊性，在临床应用中具有潜力。代码已在GitHub公开。

Abstract: Identification and quantification of myocardial scar is important for diagnosis and prognosis of cardiovascular diseases. However, reliable scar segmentation from Late Gadolinium Enhancement Cardiac Magnetic Resonance (LGE-CMR) images remains a challenge due to variations in contrast enhancement across patients, suboptimal imaging conditions such as post contrast washout, and inconsistencies in ground truth annotations on diffuse scars caused by inter observer variability. In this work, we propose a curriculum learning-based framework designed to improve segmentation performance under these challenging conditions. The method introduces a progressive training strategy that guides the model from high-confidence, clearly defined scar regions to low confidence or visually ambiguous samples with limited scar burden. By structuring the learning process in this manner, the network develops robustness to uncertain labels and subtle scar appearances that are often underrepresented in conventional training pipelines. Experimental results show that the proposed approach enhances segmentation accuracy and consistency, particularly for cases with minimal or diffuse scar, outperforming standard training baselines. This strategy provides a principled way to leverage imperfect data for improved myocardial scar quantification in clinical applications. Our code is publicly available on GitHub.

</details>


### [275] [XSPA: Crafting Imperceptible X-Shaped Sparse Adversarial Perturbations for Transferable Attacks on VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28568)
*Chengyin Hu,Jiaju Han,Xuemeng Sun,Qike Zhang,Yiwei Wei,Ang Li,Chunlei Meng,Xiang Chen,Jiahuan Long*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: XSPA是一种针对视觉语言模型的稀疏像素攻击方法，通过在两条交叉对角线上添加微小扰动，能够显著降低模型在分类、图像描述和视觉问答等多个任务上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型通过共享的视觉-文本表示空间实现跨任务泛化，但这种共享空间可能带来共同的脆弱性：微小的视觉扰动可能在共享嵌入空间中传播，导致跨任务的语义失败。需要研究VLMs对高度受限、稀疏且几何固定的扰动的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出X形稀疏像素攻击（XSPA），将扰动限制在两条交叉对角线上，相比密集扰动或灵活局部补丁，XSPA在更严格的攻击预算下工作。在稀疏支持范围内，联合优化分类目标、跨任务语义引导、以及扰动幅度和沿线平滑度的正则化。

Result: 在COCO数据集上的实验显示，XSPA仅修改约1.76%的图像像素，但能一致降低所有三个任务的性能：CLIP ViT-L/14的零样本准确率下降52.33点，OpenCLIP ViT-B/16下降67.00点；GPT-4评估的图像描述一致性下降达58.60点，VQA正确率下降达44.38点。

Conclusion: 即使高度稀疏且视觉细微的扰动，只要具有固定的几何先验，也能显著破坏VLMs中的跨任务语义，揭示了当前多模态系统中存在明显的鲁棒性差距。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) rely on a shared visual-textual representation space to perform tasks such as zero-shot classification, image captioning, and visual question answering (VQA). While this shared space enables strong cross-task generalization, it may also introduce a common vulnerability: small visual perturbations can propagate through the shared embedding space and cause correlated semantic failures across tasks. This risk is particularly important in interactive and decision-support settings, yet it remains unclear whether VLMs are robust to highly constrained, sparse, and geometrically fixed perturbations. To address this question, we propose X-shaped Sparse Pixel Attack (XSPA), an imperceptible structured attack that restricts perturbations to two intersecting diagonal lines. Compared with dense perturbations or flexible localized patches, XSPA operates under a much stricter attack budget and thus provides a more stringent test of VLM robustness. Within this sparse support, XSPA jointly optimizes a classification objective, cross-task semantic guidance, and regularization on perturbation magnitude and along-line smoothness, inducing transferable misclassification as well as semantic drift in captioning and VQA while preserving visual subtlety. Under the default setting, XSPA modifies only about 1.76% of image pixels. Experiments on the COCO dataset show that XSPA consistently degrades performance across all three tasks. Zero-shot accuracy drops by 52.33 points on OpenAI CLIP ViT-L/14 and 67.00 points on OpenCLIP ViT-B/16, while GPT-4-evaluated caption consistency decreases by up to 58.60 points and VQA correctness by up to 44.38 points. These results suggest that even highly sparse and visually subtle perturbations with fixed geometric priors can substantially disrupt cross-task semantics in VLMs, revealing a notable robustness gap in current multimodal systems.

</details>


### [276] [Navigating the Mirage: A Dual-Path Agentic Framework for Robust Misleading Chart Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28583)
*Yanjie Zhang,Yafei Li,Rui Sheng,Zixin Chen,Yanna Lin,Huamin Qu,Lei Chen,Yushi Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ChartCynics是一个双路径代理框架，通过"怀疑"推理范式来检测误导性图表，将视觉感知与数据验证解耦，显著提升了图表解读的准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型取得了成功，但误导性图表由于其欺骗性的视觉结构和扭曲的数据表示仍然是一个重大挑战。现有的整体模型难以有效应对这类视觉陷阱。

Method: ChartCynics采用双路径框架：诊断视觉路径通过ROI裁剪捕捉结构异常，OCR驱动数据路径确保数值基础。为了解决跨模态冲突，引入代理总结器，通过Oracle-Informed SFT进行推理蒸馏和Deception-Aware GRPO进行对抗对齐。

Result: 在两个基准测试中，ChartCynics分别达到74.43%和64.55%的准确率，相比Qwen3-VL-8B骨干网络提升了约29%，超越了最先进的专有模型。

Conclusion: 专门的代理工作流程可以使较小的开源模型获得卓越的鲁棒性，为可信的图表解释建立了新的基础。

Abstract: Despite the success of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), misleading charts remain a significant challenge due to their deceptive visual structures and distorted data representations. We present ChartCynics, an agentic dual-path framework designed to unmask visual deception via a "skeptical" reasoning paradigm. Unlike holistic models, ChartCynics decouples perception from verification: a Diagnostic Vision Path captures structural anomalies (e.g., inverted axes) through strategic ROI cropping, while an OCR-Driven Data Path ensures numerical grounding. To resolve cross-modal conflicts, we introduce an Agentic Summarizer optimized via a two-stage protocol: Oracle-Informed SFT for reasoning distillation and Deception-Aware GRPO for adversarial alignment. This pipeline effectively penalizes visual traps and enforces logical consistency. Evaluations on two benchmarks show that ChartCynics achieves 74.43% and 64.55% accuracy, providing an absolute performance boost of ~29% over the Qwen3-VL-8B backbone, outperforming state-of-the-art proprietary models. Our results demonstrate that specialized agentic workflows can grant smaller open-source models superior robustness, establishing a new foundation for trustworthy chart interpretation.

</details>


### [277] [ORSIFlow: Saliency-Guided Rectified Flow for Optical Remote Sensing Salient Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28584)
*Haojing Chen,Yutong Li,Zhihang Liu,Tao Tan,Haoyu Bian,Qiuju Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出ORSIFlow，一种基于整流流的遥感图像显著目标检测方法，在潜在空间中实现高效确定性生成，显著提升性能与效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决光学遥感图像显著目标检测面临的挑战：复杂背景、低对比度、不规则形状和目标尺度变化大。现有方法存在局限性，判别方法直接回归显著性图，而基于扩散的生成方法存在随机采样和高计算成本问题。

Method: 提出ORSIFlow框架，将ORSI-SOD重新定义为确定性潜在流生成问题。使用冻结变分自编码器构建紧凑潜在空间，仅需少量步骤即可高效推理。设计显著特征判别器进行全局语义判别，以及显著特征校准器进行精确边界细化。

Result: 在多个公开基准测试上进行广泛实验，ORSIFlow实现了最先进的性能，并显著提高了效率。

Conclusion: ORSIFlow通过整流流框架有效解决了光学遥感图像显著目标检测的挑战，在性能和效率方面均表现出色，代码已开源。

Abstract: Optical Remote Sensing Image Salient Object Detection (ORSI-SOD) remains challenging due to complex backgrounds, low contrast, irregular object shapes, and large variations in object scale. Existing discriminative methods directly regress saliency maps, while recent diffusion-based generative approaches suffer from stochastic sampling and high computational cost. In this paper, we propose ORSIFlow, a saliency-guided rectified flow framework that reformulates ORSI-SOD as a deterministic latent flow generation problem. ORSIFlow performs saliency mask generation in a compact latent space constructed by a frozen variational autoencoder, enabling efficient inference with only a few steps. To enhance saliency awareness, we design a Salient Feature Discriminator for global semantic discrimination and a Salient Feature Calibrator for precise boundary refinement. Extensive experiments on multiple public benchmarks show that ORSIFlow achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly improved efficiency. Codes are available at: https://github.com/Ch3nSir/ORSIFlow.

</details>


### [278] [ELViS: Efficient Visual Similarity from Local Descriptors that Generalizes Across Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28603)
*Pavel Suma,Giorgos Kordopatis-Zilos,Yannis Kalantidis,Giorgos Tolias*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ELViS是一个图像相似度模型，通过在相似度空间而非表示空间操作，利用局部描述符对应关系，结合最优传输和投票机制，有效泛化到未见领域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界检索需要处理多样化领域，但大规模实例级训练数据稀缺，模型通常在特定领域数据集上训练，因此泛化到未见数据的能力至关重要。

Method: 在相似度空间而非表示空间操作；利用局部描述符对应关系；通过数据依赖增益的最优传输步骤精炼相似度；通过投票过程将强对应关系聚合成图像级相似度。

Result: 在包含地标、艺术品、产品和多领域集合的8个数据集基准测试中，ELViS在领域外场景和平均性能上大幅超越竞争方法，同时仅需其计算成本的一小部分。

Conclusion: ELViS通过相似度空间操作、局部描述符对应关系、最优传输精炼和投票聚合的设计，注入强归纳偏置，实现了简单、高效、可解释的模型，在跨领域泛化方面表现优异。

Abstract: Large-scale instance-level training data is scarce, so models are typically trained on domain-specific datasets. Yet in real-world retrieval, they must handle diverse domains, making generalization to unseen data critical. We introduce ELViS, an image-to-image similarity model that generalizes effectively to unseen domains. Unlike conventional approaches, our model operates in similarity space rather than representation space, promoting cross-domain transfer. It leverages local descriptor correspondences, refines their similarities through an optimal transport step with data-dependent gains that suppress uninformative descriptors, and aggregates strong correspondences via a voting process into an image-level similarity. This design injects strong inductive biases, yielding a simple, efficient, and interpretable model. To assess generalization, we compile a benchmark of eight datasets spanning landmarks, artworks, products, and multi-domain collections, and evaluate ELViS as a re-ranking method. Our experiments show that ELViS outperforms competing methods by a large margin in out-of-domain scenarios and on average, while requiring only a fraction of their computational cost. Code available at: https://github.com/pavelsuma/ELViS/

</details>


### [279] [ResAdapt: Adaptive Resolution for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28610)
*Huanxuan Liao,Zhongtao Jiang,Yupu Hao,Yuqiao Tan,Shizhu He,Jun Zhao,Kun Xu,Kang Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出ResAdapt框架，通过轻量级分配器在编码前自适应分配视觉预算给每帧图像，解决MLLMs中高分辨率与长时序上下文难以兼顾的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型通过提高输入保真度增强视觉理解，但视觉token增长使得同时维持高空间分辨率和长时序上下文变得困难。瓶颈不在于编码后表示的压缩，而在于编码器接收的像素量。

Method: 提出ResAdapt输入侧适应框架，包含轻量级分配器和不变的MLLM主干。分配器学习每帧应接收的视觉预算，将分配建模为上下文赌博机问题，使用成本感知策略优化训练分配器，将稀疏的rollout反馈转化为稳定的准确率-成本学习信号。

Result: 在预算控制的视频问答、时序定位和图像推理任务中，ResAdapt改善了低预算操作点，通常位于或接近效率-准确率边界，在激进压缩下的推理密集型基准上增益最明显。在相同视觉预算下支持多达16倍帧数，性能提升超过15%。

Conclusion: ResAdapt通过在编码前自适应分配视觉预算，有效解决了MLLMs中高分辨率与长时序上下文难以兼顾的问题，显著提升了多模态推理任务的效率-准确率平衡。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve stronger visual understanding by scaling input fidelity, yet the resulting visual token growth makes jointly sustaining high spatial resolution and long temporal context prohibitive. We argue that the bottleneck lies not in how post-encoding representations are compressed but in the volume of pixels the encoder receives, and address it with ResAdapt, an Input-side adaptation framework that learns how much visual budget each frame should receive before encoding. ResAdapt couples a lightweight Allocator with an unchanged MLLM backbone, so the backbone retains its native visual-token interface while receiving an operator-transformed input. We formulate allocation as a contextual bandit and train the Allocator with Cost-Aware Policy Optimization (CAPO), which converts sparse rollout feedback into a stable accuracy-cost learning signal. Across budget-controlled video QA, temporal grounding, and image reasoning tasks, ResAdapt improves low-budget operating points and often lies on or near the efficiency-accuracy frontier, with the clearest gains on reasoning-intensive benchmarks under aggressive compression. Notably, ResAdapt supports up to 16x more frames at the same visual budget while delivering over 15% performance gain. Code is available at https://github.com/Xnhyacinth/ResAdapt.

</details>


### [280] [TGIF2: Extended Text-Guided Inpainting Forgery Dataset & Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28613)
*Hannes Mareen,Dimitrios Karageorgiou,Paschalis Giakoumoglou,Peter Lambert,Symeon Papadopoulos,Glenn Van Wallendael*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TGIF2是TGIF数据集的扩展版本，包含FLUX.1模型生成的编辑和随机非语义掩码，用于评估图像伪造定位和合成图像检测方法的鲁棒性，揭示现有方法在泛化性、对象偏见和对抗攻击方面的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着生成式AI的发展，文本引导修复成为强大的图像编辑工具，但也给媒体取证带来挑战。现有基准显示，图像伪造定位方法难以处理完全再生图像，而合成图像检测方法无法进行定位。需要更新的数据集和基准来评估取证方法的鲁棒性。

Method: 扩展TGIF数据集为TGIF2，包含FLUX.1模型生成的编辑和随机非语义掩码。进行全面的取证评估，包括图像伪造定位和合成图像检测方法的测试，微调IFL方法处理完全再生图像，并测试生成式超分辨率攻击。

Result: IFL和SID方法在FLUX.1操作上性能下降，显示有限泛化能力。微调虽能改善完全再生图像的定位，但随机掩码评估揭示对象偏见。生成式超分辨率显著削弱取证痕迹，表明常见图像增强会破坏当前取证流程。

Conclusion: TGIF2提供了更新的数据集和基准，揭示了现代修复技术和AI增强图像带来的新挑战，强调需要更鲁棒的取证方法应对不断发展的生成式AI技术。

Abstract: Generative AI has made text-guided inpainting a powerful image editing tool, but at the same time a growing challenge for media forensics. Existing benchmarks, including our text-guided inpainting forgery (TGIF) dataset, show that image forgery localization (IFL) methods can localize manipulations in spliced images but struggle not in fully regenerated (FR) images, while synthetic image detection (SID) methods can detect fully regenerated images but cannot perform localization. With new generative inpainting models emerging and the open problem of localization in FR images remaining, updated datasets and benchmarks are needed. We introduce TGIF2, an extended version of TGIF, that captures recent advances in text-guided inpainting and enables a deeper analysis of forensic robustness. TGIF2 augments the original dataset with edits generated by FLUX.1 models, as well as with random non-semantic masks. Using the TGIF2 dataset, we conduct a forensic evaluation spanning IFL and SID, including fine-tuning IFL methods on FR images and generative super-resolution attacks. Our experiments show that both IFL and SID methods degrade on FLUX.1 manipulations, highlighting limited generalization. Additionally, while fine-tuning improves localization on FR images, evaluation with random non-semantic masks reveals object bias. Furthermore, generative super-resolution significantly weakens forensic traces, demonstrating that common image enhancement operations can undermine current forensic pipelines. In summary, TGIF2 provides an updated dataset and benchmark, which enables new insights into the challenges posed by modern inpainting and AI-based image enhancements. TGIF2 is available at https://github.com/IDLabMedia/tgif-dataset.

</details>


### [281] [Divide and Restore: A Modular Task-Decoupled Framework for Universal Image Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28658)
*Joanna Wiekiera,Martyna Zur*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于诊断路由的模块化图像修复框架，通过轻量级CNN分类器动态选择专用修复节点，避免任务干扰并降低训练成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前图像修复方法多采用复杂的单体架构，存在任务间负干扰问题，且需要大量联合训练计算资源。需要一种更高效、可扩展的解决方案。

Method: 设计模块化任务解耦框架，包含轻量级CNN分类器作为路由器，评估输入图像后动态路由到专用修复节点。框架采用模型无关的扩展性设计，以三个独立U-Net专家为例，可集成任意修复方法。

Result: 实验表明该框架在标准本地硬件上提供可扩展、高效的多退化修复方案，避免了特征冲突，显著降低训练开销，添加新退化类型只需训练单个专家和更新路由器。

Conclusion: 模块化诊断路由框架为多退化图像修复提供了计算可访问、可扩展且高效的解决方案，优于复杂的单体架构。

Abstract: Restoring images affected by various types of degradation, such as noise, blur, or improper exposure, remains a significant challenge in computer vision. While recent trends favor complex monolithic all-in-one architectures, these models often suffer from negative task interference and require extensive joint training cycles on high-end computing clusters. In this paper, we propose a modular, task-decoupled image restoration framework based on an explicit diagnostic routing mechanism. The architecture consists of a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) classifier that evaluates the input image and dynamically directs it to a specialized restoration node. A key advantage of this framework is its model-agnostic extensibility: while we demonstrate it using three independent U-Net experts, the system allows for the integration of any restoration method tailored to specific tasks. By isolating reconstruction paths, the framework prevents feature conflicts and significantly reduces training overhead. Unlike monolithic models, adding new degradation types in our framework only requires training a single expert and updating the router, rather than a full system retraining. Experimental results demonstrate that this computationally accessible approach offers a scalable and efficient solution for multi-degradation restoration on standard local hardware. The code will be published upon paper acceptance.

</details>


### [282] [Industrial3D: A Terrestrial LiDAR Point Cloud Dataset and CrossParadigm Benchmark for Industrial Infrastructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28660)
*Chao Yin,Hongzhe Yue,Qing Han,Difeng Hu,Zhenyu Liang,Fangzhou Lin,Bing Sun,Boyu Wang,Mingkai Li,Wei Yao,Jack C. P. Cheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 工业MEP设施点云语义分割面临极端挑战，作者提出Industrial3D数据集和首个跨范式基准测试，揭示领域迁移难题源于统计稀有性和几何模糊性的双重危机。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业机械、电气和管道（MEP）设施的TLS采集存在极端几何模糊性、严重遮挡和极端类别不平衡，现有建筑基准（如S3DIS、ScanNet）无法充分代表这些挑战，导致该领域语义理解问题尚未解决。

Method: 1. 构建Industrial3D数据集：包含13个水处理设施的6.12亿个专家标注点，分辨率6毫米，规模是现有最接近MEP数据集的6.6倍；2. 建立首个工业跨范式基准：在统一基准协议下评估九种代表性方法，涵盖全监督、弱监督、无监督和基础模型设置。

Result: 最佳监督方法达到55.74% mIoU，而零样本Point-SAM仅15.79%，存在39.95个百分点的差距，量化了工业TLS数据的未解决领域迁移挑战。系统分析显示这一差距源于双重危机：统计稀有性（215:1不平衡，比S3DIS严重3.5倍）和几何模糊性（尾类点与头部管道类共享圆柱基元），仅靠频率重新加权无法解决。

Conclusion: Industrial3D为工业3D场景理解提供了最大且最具挑战性的测试平台，揭示了当前方法在工业MEP设施点云语义分割中的局限性，特别是领域迁移挑战，为未来研究指明了方向。

Abstract: Automated semantic understanding of dense point clouds is a prerequisite for Scan-to-BIM pipelines, digital twin construction, and as-built verification--core tasks in the digital transformation of the construction industry. Yet for industrial mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) facilities, this challenge remains largely unsolved: TLS acquisitions of water treatment plants, chiller halls, and pumping stations exhibit extreme geometric ambiguity, severe occlusion, and extreme class imbalance that architectural benchmarks (e.g., S3DIS or ScanNet) cannot adequately represent. We present Industrial3D, a terrestrial LiDAR dataset comprising 612 million expertly labelled points at 6 mm resolution from 13 water treatment facilities. At 6.6x the scale of the closest comparable MEP dataset, Industrial3D provides the largest and most demanding testbed for industrial 3D scene understanding to date. We further establish the first industrial cross-paradigm benchmark, evaluating nine representative methods across fully supervised, weakly supervised, unsupervised, and foundation model settings under a unified benchmark protocol. The best supervised method achieves 55.74% mIoU, whereas zero-shot Point-SAM reaches only 15.79%--a 39.95 percentage-point gap that quantifies the unresolved domain-transfer challenge for industrial TLS data. Systematic analysis reveals that this gap originates from a dual crisis: statistical rarity (215:1 imbalance, 3.5x more severe than S3DIS) and geometric ambiguity (tail-class points share cylindrical primitives with head-class pipes) that frequency-based re-weighting alone cannot resolve. Industrial3D, along with benchmark code and pre-trained models, will be publicly available at https://github.com/pointcloudyc/Industrial3D.

</details>


### [283] [AdaptToken: Entropy-based Adaptive Token Selection for MLLM Long Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28696)
*Haozhe Qi,Kevin Qu,Mahdi Rad,Rui Wang,Alexander Mathis,Marc Pollefeys*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AdaptToken：一种基于MLLM自不确定性的训练免费长视频token选择框架，通过熵信号实现全局token预算分配和早期停止，显著提升长视频理解性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法处理长视频时存在两个主要问题：1) 缺乏跨远距离视频片段比较相关性的机制；2) 无法在收集足够证据后停止处理。这导致高内存成本和上下文长度限制下的长视频理解困难

Method: 将视频分组，提取跨模态注意力对组内token排序，使用模型响应熵估计每组与提示的相关性。熵信号实现全局token预算分配，并支持早期停止（AdaptToken-Lite）

Result: 在四个长视频基准测试和多个基础MLLM上，AdaptToken持续提升准确率（如Qwen2.5-VL 7B平均+6.7），支持极长输入（达10K帧），AdaptToken-Lite减少约一半推理时间且性能相当

Conclusion: AdaptToken框架有效解决了长视频理解中的关键挑战，通过模型自不确定性实现智能token选择，在性能和效率之间取得了良好平衡，为长视频分析提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Long video understanding remains challenging for Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) due to high memory costs and context-length limits. Prior approaches mitigate this by scoring and selecting frames/tokens within short clips, but they lack a principled mechanism to (i) compare relevance across distant video clips and (ii) stop processing once sufficient evidence has been gathered. We propose AdaptToken, a training-free framework that turns an MLLM's self-uncertainty into a global control signal for long-video token selection. AdaptToken splits a video into groups, extracts cross-modal attention to rank tokens within each group, and uses the model's response entropy to estimate each group's prompt relevance. This entropy signal enables a global token budget allocation across groups and further supports early stopping (AdaptToken-Lite), skipping the remaining groups when the model becomes sufficiently certain. Across four long-video benchmarks (VideoMME, LongVideoBench, LVBench, and MLVU) and multiple base MLLMs (7B-72B), AdaptToken consistently improves accuracy (e.g., +6.7 on average over Qwen2.5-VL 7B) and continues to benefit from extremely long inputs (up to 10K frames), while AdaptToken-Lite reduces inference time by about half with comparable performance. Project page: https://haozheqi.github.io/adapt-token

</details>


### [284] [DreamLite: A Lightweight On-Device Unified Model for Image Generation and Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28713)
*Kailai Feng,Yuxiang Wei,Bo Chen,Yang Pan,Hu Ye,Songwei Liu,Chenqian Yan,Yuan Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DreamLite是一个0.39B参数的轻量级扩散模型，在单个网络中同时支持文本到图像生成和文本引导图像编辑，可在移动设备上1秒内完成处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型参数量大（数十亿），导致高延迟和部署困难。移动端扩散模型主要关注图像生成，缺乏图像编辑功能。需要一种紧凑的统一模型，同时支持生成和编辑任务。

Method: 基于剪枝的移动U-Net骨干，通过潜在空间中的上下文空间拼接统一条件处理：生成任务使用(目标|空白)配置，编辑任务使用(目标|源)配置。采用任务渐进联合预训练策略，依次针对生成、编辑和联合任务进行训练。通过SFT和强化学习优化，并使用步骤蒸馏将去噪过程减少到4步。

Result: DreamLite在图像生成（GenEval 0.72）和图像编辑（ImgEdit 4.11）方面均优于现有移动端模型，与多个服务器端模型竞争。在小米14手机上，可在1秒内生成或编辑1024×1024图像。

Conclusion: DreamLite是首个支持图像生成和编辑的统一移动端扩散模型，通过紧凑设计（0.39B参数）和高效优化，在移动设备上实现了高质量的快速图像处理。

Abstract: Diffusion models have made significant progress in both text-to-image (T2I) generation and text-guided image editing. However, these models are typically built with billions of parameters, leading to high latency and increased deployment challenges. While on-device diffusion models improve efficiency, they largely focus on T2I generation and lack support for image editing. In this paper, we propose DreamLite, a compact unified on-device diffusion model (0.39B) that supports both T2I generation and text-guided image editing within a single network. DreamLite is built on a pruned mobile U-Net backbone and unifies conditioning through in-context spatial concatenation in the latent space. It concatenates images horizontally as input, using a (target | blank) configuration for generation tasks and (target | source) for editing tasks. To stabilize the training of this compact model, we introduce a task-progressive joint pretraining strategy that sequentially targets T2I, editing, and joint tasks. After high-quality SFT and reinforcement learning, DreamLite achieves GenEval (0.72) for image generation and ImgEdit (4.11) for image editing, outperforming existing on-device models and remaining competitive with several server-side models. By employing step distillation, we further reduce denoising processing to just 4 steps, enabling our DreamLite could generate or edit a 1024 x 1024 image in less than 1s on a Xiaomi 14 smartphone. To the best of our knowledge, DreamLite is the first unified on-device diffusion model that supports both image generation and image editing.

</details>


### [285] [SonoWorld: From One Image to a 3D Audio-Visual Scene](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28757)
*Derong Jin,Xiyi Chen,Ming C. Lin,Ruohan Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Image2AVScene任务：从单张图像生成3D音频-视觉场景，SonoWorld框架通过全景外推、3D场景构建、语言引导声音锚点放置和环绕声渲染实现


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉场景生成技术可以将单张图像转化为可探索的3D世界，但缺乏声音使得沉浸感不完整，需要完整的音频-视觉场景生成

Method: SonoWorld框架：1)从单张图像外推360°全景图；2)将全景图提升为可导航3D场景；3)放置语言引导的声音锚点；4)渲染点源、面源和环境源的环绕声，确保空间音频与场景几何和语义对齐

Result: 在新构建的真实世界数据集上的定量评估和受控用户研究证实了方法的有效性，还能应用于单次声学学习和音频-视觉空间源分离

Conclusion: 提出了Image2AVScene新任务和SonoWorld框架，首次实现从单张图像生成完整的3D音频-视觉场景，为沉浸式体验和音频-视觉应用开辟了新方向

Abstract: Tremendous progress in visual scene generation now turns a single image into an explorable 3D world, yet immersion remains incomplete without sound. We introduce Image2AVScene, the task of generating a 3D audio-visual scene from a single image, and present SonoWorld, the first framework to tackle this challenge. From one image, our pipeline outpaints a 360° panorama, lifts it into a navigable 3D scene, places language-guided sound anchors, and renders ambisonics for point, areal, and ambient sources, yielding spatial audio aligned with scene geometry and semantics. Quantitative evaluations on a newly curated real-world dataset and a controlled user study confirm the effectiveness of our approach. Beyond free-viewpoint audio-visual rendering, we also demonstrate applications to one-shot acoustic learning and audio-visual spatial source separation. Project website: https://humathe.github.io/sonoworld/

</details>


### [286] [FlowIt: Global Matching for Optical Flow with Confidence-Guided Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28759)
*Sadra Safadoust,Fabio Tosi,Matteo Poggi,Fatma Güney*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FlowIt是一种用于光流估计的新型架构，通过分层Transformer捕获全局上下文，将光流初始化建模为最优传输问题，生成鲁棒的初始光流场、遮挡图和置信度图，并通过引导细化阶段传播可靠运动估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有光流估计方法在处理大像素位移时存在局限性，需要更鲁棒的方法来建模长距离对应关系并处理遮挡和模糊区域。

Method: 1. 使用分层Transformer架构捕获全局上下文；2. 将光流初始化建模为最优传输问题，生成初始光流场、遮挡图和置信度图；3. 通过引导细化阶段，将高置信度区域的可靠运动估计传播到低置信度区域。

Result: 在Sintel和KITTI基准测试中达到最先进水平，同时在Sintel、Spring和LayeredFlow数据集上实现了最先进的跨数据集零样本泛化性能。

Conclusion: FlowIt通过结合全局上下文建模、最优传输公式和引导细化，有效解决了大像素位移的光流估计问题，在多个基准测试中表现出优越性能。

Abstract: We present FlowIt, a novel architecture for optical flow estimation designed to robustly handle large pixel displacements. At its core, FlowIt leverages a hierarchical transformer architecture that captures extensive global context, enabling the model to effectively model long-range correspondences. To overcome the limitations of localized matching, we formulate the flow initialization as an optimal transport problem. This formulation yields a highly robust initial flow field, alongside explicitly derived occlusion and confidence maps. These cues are then seamlessly integrated into a guided refinement stage, where the network actively propagates reliable motion estimates from high-confidence regions into ambiguous, low-confidence areas. Extensive experiments across the Sintel, KITTI, Spring, and LayeredFlow datasets validate the efficacy of our approach. FlowIt achieves state-of-the-art results on the competitive Sintel and KITTI benchmarks, while simultaneously establishing new state-of-the-art cross-dataset zero-shot generalization performance on Sintel, Spring, and LayeredFlow.

</details>


### [287] [PoseDreamer: Scalable and Photorealistic Human Data Generation Pipeline with Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28763)
*Lorenza Prospero,Orest Kupyn,Ostap Viniavskyi,João F. Henriques,Christian Rupprecht*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PoseDreamer利用扩散模型生成大规模带3D网格标注的合成数据集，解决3D人体网格估计中标注数据稀缺问题，性能优于传统合成和真实数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D人体网格估计面临标注数据获取困难的问题：真实数据集规模有限且标注昂贵，合成数据集缺乏真实感和多样性。需要探索生成数据作为第三条路径。

Method: 提出PoseDreamer管道，结合可控图像生成和直接偏好优化进行控制对齐，采用课程式困难样本挖掘和多阶段质量过滤，确保3D标注与生成图像的一致性并优先选择挑战性样本。

Result: 生成超过50万高质量合成样本，图像质量指标比基于渲染的数据集提升76%。在PoseDreamer上训练的模型性能达到或超过基于真实和传统合成数据集的模型，且与合成数据集结合时表现优于真实与合成数据集结合。

Conclusion: 生成数据是解决3D人体网格估计数据稀缺问题的有效第三条路径，PoseDreamer生成的合成数据集具有高质量和互补性，将公开发布数据集和生成代码。

Abstract: Acquiring labeled datasets for 3D human mesh estimation is challenging due to depth ambiguities and the inherent difficulty of annotating 3D geometry from monocular images. Existing datasets are either real, with manually annotated 3D geometry and limited scale, or synthetic, rendered from 3D engines that provide precise labels but suffer from limited photorealism, low diversity, and high production costs. In this work, we explore a third path: generated data. We introduce PoseDreamer, a novel pipeline that leverages diffusion models to generate large-scale synthetic datasets with 3D mesh annotations. Our approach combines controllable image generation with Direct Preference Optimization for control alignment, curriculum-based hard sample mining, and multi-stage quality filtering. Together, these components naturally maintain correspondence between 3D labels and generated images, while prioritizing challenging samples to maximize dataset utility. Using PoseDreamer, we generate more than 500,000 high-quality synthetic samples, achieving a 76% improvement in image-quality metrics compared to rendering-based datasets. Models trained on PoseDreamer achieve performance comparable to or superior to those trained on real-world and traditional synthetic datasets. In addition, combining PoseDreamer with synthetic datasets results in better performance than combining real-world and synthetic datasets, demonstrating the complementary nature of our dataset. We will release the full dataset and generation code.

</details>


### [288] [HandX: Scaling Bimanual Motion and Interaction Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28766)
*Zimu Zhang,Yucheng Zhang,Xiyan Xu,Ziyin Wang,Sirui Xu,Kai Zhou,Bing Zhou,Chuan Guo,Jian Wang,Yu-Xiong Wang,Liang-Yan Gui*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HandX是一个统一的手部运动基础框架，包含数据、标注和评估，专注于解决双手交互和精细手指动态的生成问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全身运动模型缺乏驱动灵巧行为的精细线索，如手指关节、接触时机和双手协调，且现有资源缺少捕捉细微手指动态和协作的高保真双手序列数据。

Method: 整合和过滤现有数据集以提高质量，并收集新的动捕数据集；采用解耦标注策略提取运动特征，利用大语言模型生成语义丰富的描述；基于数据标注基准扩散和自回归模型。

Result: 实现了高质量灵巧运动生成，新提出的手部专注指标支持评估效果；观察到清晰的缩放趋势：更大模型在更大、更高质量数据集上训练产生更语义连贯的双手运动。

Conclusion: HandX为双手交互和精细手指动态生成提供了统一的数据、标注和评估基础，支持未来研究并发布了数据集。

Abstract: Synthesizing human motion has advanced rapidly, yet realistic hand motion and bimanual interaction remain underexplored. Whole-body models often miss the fine-grained cues that drive dexterous behavior, finger articulation, contact timing, and inter-hand coordination, and existing resources lack high-fidelity bimanual sequences that capture nuanced finger dynamics and collaboration. To fill this gap, we present HandX, a unified foundation spanning data, annotation, and evaluation. We consolidate and filter existing datasets for quality, and collect a new motion-capture dataset targeting underrepresented bimanual interactions with detailed finger dynamics. For scalable annotation, we introduce a decoupled strategy that extracts representative motion features, e.g., contact events and finger flexion, and then leverages reasoning from large language models to produce fine-grained, semantically rich descriptions aligned with these features. Building on the resulting data and annotations, we benchmark diffusion and autoregressive models with versatile conditioning modes. Experiments demonstrate high-quality dexterous motion generation, supported by our newly proposed hand-focused metrics. We further observe clear scaling trends: larger models trained on larger, higher-quality datasets produce more semantically coherent bimanual motion. Our dataset is released to support future research.

</details>


### [289] [Gen-Searcher: Reinforcing Agentic Search for Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28767)
*Kaituo Feng,Manyuan Zhang,Shuang Chen,Yunlong Lin,Kaixuan Fan,Yilei Jiang,Hongyu Li,Dian Zheng,Chenyang Wang,Xiangyu Yue*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Gen-Searcher：首个搜索增强图像生成智能体，通过多跳推理和搜索收集文本知识和参考图像，解决现有模型知识冻结和时效性不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像生成模型受限于冻结的内部知识，在处理需要密集知识或最新信息的真实场景时表现不佳，需要外部知识增强。

Method: 构建数据管道和高质量数据集（Gen-Searcher-SFT-10k 和 Gen-Searcher-RL-6k），引入 KnowGen 基准，采用 SFT 和基于双奖励反馈的智能体强化学习（GRPO）训练搜索增强图像生成智能体。

Result: Gen-Searcher 显著提升性能，在 KnowGen 基准上提升 Qwen-Image 约 16 分，在 WISE 基准上提升 15 分。

Conclusion: 该工作为图像生成领域的搜索智能体提供了开放基础，并开源了数据、模型和代码，有望推动搜索增强图像生成的发展。

Abstract: Recent image generation models have shown strong capabilities in generating high-fidelity and photorealistic images. However, they are fundamentally constrained by frozen internal knowledge, thus often failing on real-world scenarios that are knowledge-intensive or require up-to-date information. In this paper, we present Gen-Searcher, as the first attempt to train a search-augmented image generation agent, which performs multi-hop reasoning and search to collect the textual knowledge and reference images needed for grounded generation. To achieve this, we construct a tailored data pipeline and curate two high-quality datasets, Gen-Searcher-SFT-10k and Gen-Searcher-RL-6k, containing diverse search-intensive prompts and corresponding ground-truth synthesis images. We further introduce KnowGen, a comprehensive benchmark that explicitly requires search-grounded external knowledge for image generation and evaluates models from multiple dimensions. Based on these resources, we train Gen-Searcher with SFT followed by agentic reinforcement learning with dual reward feedback, which combines text-based and image-based rewards to provide more stable and informative learning signals for GRPO training. Experiments show that Gen-Searcher brings substantial gains, improving Qwen-Image by around 16 points on KnowGen and 15 points on WISE. We hope this work can serve as an open foundation for search agents in image generation, and we fully open-source our data, models, and code.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [290] [Co-designing a Social Robot for Newcomer Children's Cultural and Language Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26674)
*Neil Fernandes,Tehniyat Shahbaz,Emily Davies-Robinson,Yue Hu,Kerstin Dautenhahn*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 通过专家共同设计研究，探索社会辅助机器人在新移民儿童语言文化学习中的设计空间，提出初步设计指南。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 新移民儿童面临语言习得障碍，现有识字项目受限于师资、混合能力班级和有限时间。社会辅助机器人（SARs）在教育中显示潜力，但在这种社会情感敏感环境中的应用尚未充分探索。

Method: 与项目导师和协调员进行共同设计研究，探索社交机器人Maple的设计空间，通过专家讨论获取领域见解。

Result: 贡献包括：1）总结四个常见挑战的领域概述；2）关于机器人文化适应和社区归属的讨论；3）专家对SAR在文化和语言学习中角色的认知讨论；4）将SAR整合到课堂的初步设计指南。

Conclusion: 专家见解为新移民儿童及其家庭的迭代设计和评估奠定了基础，为SAR在敏感教育环境中的应用提供了理论框架。

Abstract: Newcomer children face barriers in acquiring the host country's language and literacy programs are often constrained by limited staffing, mixed-proficiency cohorts, and short contact time. While Socially Assistive Robots (SARs) show promise in education, their use in these socio-emotionally sensitive settings remains underexplored. This research presents a co-design study with program tutors and coordinators, to explore the design space for a social robot, Maple. We contribute (1) a domain summary outlining four recurring challenges, (2) a discussion on cultural orientation and community belonging with robots, (3) an expert-grounded discussion of the perceived role of an SAR in cultural and language learning, and (4) preliminary design guidelines for integrating an SAR into a classroom. These expert-grounded insights lay the foundation for iterative design and evaluation with newcomer children and their families.

</details>


### [291] [Contextual Graph Representations for Task-Driven 3D Perception and Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26685)
*Christopher Agia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文研究3D场景图在机器人任务规划中的应用，针对其状态空间过大的问题，构建了基准测试并探索图神经网络学习高效规划表示的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D场景图虽然能提供丰富的物体关系表示，但包含过多无关对象和关系，导致任务规划的状态空间过大，限制了在资源受限环境中的部署。

Method: 1) 评估现有具身AI环境对3D场景图与任务规划交叉研究的适用性；2) 构建基准测试用于比较最先进的经典规划器；3) 探索使用图神经网络利用规划领域关系结构中的不变性，学习支持快速规划的表示。

Result: 论文构建了用于3D场景图任务规划的基准测试环境，并展示了图神经网络在利用关系结构不变性、学习高效规划表示方面的潜力。

Conclusion: 通过基准测试和图神经网络方法，该研究为3D场景图在机器人任务规划中的实际应用提供了重要基础，能够缓解状态空间过大的问题，促进在资源受限环境中的部署。

Abstract: Recent advances in computer vision facilitate fully automatic extraction of object-centric relational representations from visual-inertial data. These state representations, dubbed 3D scene graphs, are a hierarchical decomposition of real-world scenes with a dense multiplex graph structure. While 3D scene graphs claim to promote efficient task planning for robot systems, they contain numerous objects and relations when only small subsets are required for a given task. This magnifies the state space that task planners must operate over and prohibits deployment in resource constrained settings. This thesis tests the suitability of existing embodied AI environments for research at the intersection of robot task planning and 3D scene graphs and constructs a benchmark for empirical comparison of state-of-the-art classical planners. Furthermore, we explore the use of graph neural networks to harness invariances in the relational structure of planning domains and learn representations that afford faster planning.

</details>


### [292] [Bridging the Awareness Gap: Socially Mediated State Externalization for Transparent Distributed Home Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26686)
*Wenzheng Zhao,Manideep Duggi,Fengpei Yuan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了通过社交中介机器人实时外部化隐藏机器人状态，以解决分布式家庭机器人系统中用户对不可见机器人状态感知不足的问题，结果显示这种方法能显著提升用户关注度和用户体验，且不影响任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分布式家庭机器人系统通常需要在用户视线外运行，这导致用户对机器人状态感知不足，从而降低信任感、透明度和控制感。需要一种方法在不影响任务性能的前提下，弥合这种状态感知差距。

Method: 开发了一个系统，其中共处的社交中介机器人（Pepper）通过语音更新和视觉进度显示，外部化隐藏的移动机械臂（Stretch~3）在执行语音驱动物体检索和递送任务时的状态。采用平衡组内设计研究（N=30），比较了"自主隐藏执行"基线条件和"社交中介状态外部化"条件。

Result: 状态外部化显著提高了用户任务关注度（从15.8%提升到84.6%，p<.001），并显著改善了用户感知的清晰度、可靠性、刺激性和吸引力（所有p<.001）。83%的参与者偏好外部化条件，且用户体验的改善并未导致端到端任务完成时间显著增加（p=.271）。

Conclusion: 社交中介状态外部化是设计更透明、可信赖的分布式机器人系统的有效架构机制，能够在分布式家庭机器人部署中最终提升用户体验，且不牺牲性能。

Abstract: Distributed multi-robot systems for the home often require robots to operate out of the user's sight, creating a state awareness gap that can diminish trust and perceived transparency and control. This paper investigates whether real-time, socially mediated state externalization can bridge this gap without compromising task performance. We developed a system where a co-located social mediator robot (Pepper) externalizes the hidden execution states of an out-of-sight mobile manipulator (Stretch~3) for voice-driven object retrieval and delivery, where task-level states are synchronized and externalized through verbal updates and visual progress display. In a counterbalanced within-subject study (N=30), we compared a baseline of Autonomous Hidden Execution against Socially Mediated State Externalization. Our results show that externalization significantly increases user task-focused attention (from 15.8% to 84.6%, p<.001) and substantially improves perceived perspicuity, dependability, stimulation, and attractiveness (all p<.001). Furthermore, 83% of participants preferred the externalized condition, and this improvement in user experience was achieved without a statistically significant increase in end-to-end task completion time (p=.271). The results suggest that socially mediated state externalization is an effective architectural mechanism for designing more transparent and trustworthy distributed robot systems, ultimately enhancing user experience without sacrificing performance in distributed home robot deployments.

</details>


### [293] [Learning Energy-Efficient Air--Ground Actuation for Hybrid Robots on Stair-Like Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26687)
*Jiaxing Li,Wen Tian,Xinhang Xu,Junbin Yuan,Sebastian Scherer,Muqing Cao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于强化学习的能量感知混合控制框架，让空中-地面混合机器人学习协调螺旋桨、轮子和倾斜舵机的单一连续策略，实现能量高效的边缘跨越。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合空中-地面机器人面临阶梯状不连续地形时的权衡问题：仅用轮子容易在边缘卡住，而仅用飞行虽然能跨越但能量消耗大。需要一种能在两种模式间无缝切换且能量高效的控制策略。

Method: 使用能量感知强化学习框架，训练单一连续策略协调螺旋桨、轮子和倾斜舵机，无需预定义空中和地面模式。在Isaac Lab中使用并行环境训练，基于硬件校准的推力/功率模型，奖励函数惩罚真实电能消耗。

Result: 学习到的策略发现了推力辅助驾驶技术，融合了空中推力和地面牵引力。仿真中能量消耗比仅用螺旋桨控制低约4倍。在DoubleBee原型机上8cm间隙爬升任务中，平均功率比基于规则的解耦控制器低38%。

Conclusion: 研究表明，通过强化学习可以自动发现能量高效的混合驱动策略，并且能够成功部署到实际硬件上，解决了混合机器人在地形不连续处的能量效率问题。

Abstract: Hybrid aerial--ground robots offer both traversability and endurance, but stair-like discontinuities create a trade-off: wheels alone often stall at edges, while flight is energy-hungry for small height gains. We propose an energy-aware reinforcement learning framework that trains a single continuous policy to coordinate propellers, wheels, and tilt servos without predefined aerial and ground modes. We train policies from proprioception and a local height scan in Isaac Lab with parallel environments, using hardware-calibrated thrust/power models so the reward penalizes true electrical energy. The learned policy discovers thrust-assisted driving that blends aerial thrust and ground traction. In simulation it achieves about 4 times lower energy than propeller-only control. We transfer the policy to a DoubleBee prototype on an 8cm gap-climbing task; it achieves 38% lower average power than a rule-based decoupled controller. These results show that efficient hybrid actuation can emerge from learning and deploy on hardware.

</details>


### [294] [SpatialPoint: Spatial-aware Point Prediction for Embodied Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26690)
*Qiming Zhu,Zhirui Fang,Tianming Zhang,Chuanxiu Liu,Xiaoke Jiang,Lei Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文提出了"具身定位"问题，即根据视觉观察和语言指令预测可执行的3D点，并开发了SpatialPoint框架，通过集成深度信息提升具身定位性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言系统主要依赖RGB输入，缺乏对3D几何的显式建模，限制了跨场景泛化能力。虽然机器人广泛使用RGB-D传感器，但深度信息在视觉语言模型中的整合不足，无法有效支持具身智能所需的3D空间定位能力。

Method: 提出SpatialPoint框架，将结构化深度信息集成到视觉语言模型中，生成相机坐标系下的3D坐标。定义了两种目标类型：可触摸点（与表面相关的物理交互点）和空中点（自由空间中的导航、放置目标点）。构建了包含260万样本的RGB-D数据集进行训练和评估。

Result: 实验表明，将深度信息整合到视觉语言模型中显著提升了具身定位性能。在实际机器人部署中，SpatialPoint成功应用于三个代表性任务：语言引导的机械臂在指定位置抓取、物体放置到目标位置、以及移动机器人导航到目标位置。

Conclusion: 具身定位是实现具身智能的关键能力，SpatialPoint通过显式整合深度信息有效解决了这一问题，为机器人执行语言指令的3D空间任务提供了实用解决方案，证明了深度感知在视觉语言模型中的重要性。

Abstract: Embodied intelligence fundamentally requires a capability to determine where to act in 3D space. We formalize this requirement as embodied localization -- the problem of predicting executable 3D points conditioned on visual observations and language instructions. We instantiate embodied localization with two complementary target types: touchable points, surface-grounded 3D points enabling direct physical interaction, and air points, free-space 3D points specifying placement and navigation goals, directional constraints, or geometric relations. Embodied localization is inherently a problem of embodied 3D spatial reasoning -- yet most existing vision-language systems rely predominantly on RGB inputs, necessitating implicit geometric reconstruction that limits cross-scene generalization, despite the widespread adoption of RGB-D sensors in robotics. To address this gap, we propose SpatialPoint, a spatial-aware vision-language framework with careful design that integrates structured depth into a vision-language model (VLM) and generates camera-frame 3D coordinates. We construct a 2.6M-sample RGB-D dataset covering both touchable and air points QA pairs for training and evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that incorporating depth into VLMs significantly improves embodied localization performance. We further validate SpatialPoint through real-robot deployment across three representative tasks: language-guided robotic arm grasping at specified locations, object placement to target destinations, and mobile robot navigation to goal positions.

</details>


### [295] [Topological Motion Planning Diffusion: Generative Tangle-Free Path Planning for Tethered Robots in Obstacle-Rich Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26696)
*Yifu Tian,Xinhang Xu,Thien-Minh Nguyen,Muqing Cao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出TMPD框架，结合终身拓扑记忆和扩散模型，解决系留机器人在复杂环境中的长期运动规划问题，避免电缆缠绕。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在极端环境（如水下探索、灾后救援）中，系留机器人需要持续导航同时避免电缆缠绕。传统规划器因缺乏拓扑感知而难以应对长期规划场景，而拓扑增强的图搜索方法在障碍物丰富的环境中面临计算瓶颈。

Method: 提出拓扑运动规划扩散（TMPD）框架：1）前端使用扩散模型生成多模态、运动学可行的轨迹候选，覆盖不同同伦类；2）后端通过计算广义绕组数评估拓扑能量，基于累积的系留配置进行过滤和优化。

Result: 在障碍物丰富的模拟环境中，TMPD实现100%无碰撞到达率和97.0%无缠绕率，在几何平滑度和计算效率上均优于传统拓扑搜索和纯运动学扩散基线。实际电缆动力学仿真进一步验证了实用性。

Conclusion: TMPD通过结合终身拓扑记忆和生成式规划，有效解决了系留机器人在复杂环境中的长期运动规划问题，在保持计算效率的同时实现了高无碰撞和无缠绕性能。

Abstract: In extreme environments such as underwater exploration and post-disaster rescue, tethered robots require continuous navigation while avoiding cable entanglement. Traditional planners struggle in these lifelong planning scenarios due to topological unawareness, while topology-augmented graph-search methods face computational bottlenecks in obstacle-rich environments where the number of candidate topological classes increases. To address these challenges, we propose Topological Motion Planning Diffusion (TMPD), a novel generative planning framework that integrates lifelong topological memory. Instead of relying on sequential graph search, TMPD leverages a diffusion model to propose a multimodal front-end of kinematically feasible trajectory candidates across various homotopy classes. A tether-aware topological back-end then filters and optimizes these candidates by computing generalized winding numbers to evaluate their topological energy against the accumulated tether configuration. Benchmarking in obstacle-rich simulated environments demonstrates that TMPD achieves a collision-free reach of 100% and a tangle-free rate of 97.0%, outperforming traditional topological search and purely kinematic diffusion baselines in both geometric smoothness and computational efficiency. Simulation with realistic cable dynamics further validates the practicality of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [296] [Surface-Constrained Offline Warping with Contact-Aware Online Pose Projection for Safe Robotic Trajectory Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26711)
*Farong Wang,Sai Swaminathan,Fei Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出两阶段框架，将离线几何嵌入与在线执行调节分离，实现曲面上的重复工具运动轨迹稳定执行


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在曲面加工、检测和引导交互中，需要重复工具沿曲面运动。现有方法将标称运动基元直接平铺到非平面曲面时，会产生几何不一致性，导致穿透、方向不连续和累积漂移等问题

Method: 两阶段框架：1) 离线表面约束变形算子通过非对称微分同胚变形和轴一致方向补全，将标称周期基元嵌入曲面；2) 在线接触感知投影算子使用FSR驱动的扰动适应和锥形方向安全约束，确保相对于参考轨迹的有界偏差

Result: 在多个解析曲面族和实际机器人正弦曲面上的实验表明，相比直接平铺方法，该方法在几何连续性、减少大方向跳跃和保持稳定接触方面表现更好

Conclusion: 将离线几何重映射与轻量级在线投影解耦，能够在传感器反馈有限的情况下实现稳定可重复的曲面嵌入式轨迹执行

Abstract: Robotic manipulation tasks that require repeated tool motion along curved surfaces frequently arise in surface finishing, inspection, and guided interaction. In practice, nominal motion primitives are often designed independently of the deployment surface and later reused across varying geometries. Directly tiling such primitives onto nonplanar surfaces introduces geometric inconsistencies, leading to interpenetration, orientation discontinuities, and cumulative drift over repeated cycles. We present a two-stage framework that separates geometric embedding from execution-level regulation. An offline surface-constrained warping operator embeds a nominal periodic primitive onto curved surfaces through asymmetric diffeomorphic deformation of dual-track waypoints and axis-consistent orientation completion, producing a surface-adapted reference trajectory. An online contact-aware projection operator then enforces bounded deviation relative to this reference using FSR-driven disturbance adaptation and a conic orientation safety constraint. Experiments across multiple analytic surface families and real-robot validation on a sinusoidal surface demonstrate improved geometric continuity, reduced large orientation jumps, and robust contact maintenance compared with direct tiling. These results show that decoupling offline geometric remapping from lightweight online projection enables stable and repeatable surface-embedded trajectory execution under sensor-lite feedbacks.

</details>


### [297] [SutureAgent: Learning Surgical Trajectories via Goal-conditioned Offline RL in Pixel Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26720)
*Huanrong Liu,Chunlin Tian,Tongyu Jia,Tailai Zhou,Qin Liu,Yu Gao,Yutong Ban,Yun Gu,Guy Rosman,Xin Ma,Qingbiao Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出SutureAgent框架，将内窥镜视频中的缝合针轨迹预测建模为像素空间中的序列决策问题，通过离线强化学习实现精准轨迹预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法直接从视觉观察学习运动分布时忽略了相邻运动步骤之间的序列依赖性，且稀疏的路径点标注无法提供足够的监督信号，增加了监督学习或模仿学习的难度。

Method: 将针尖视为在像素空间中逐步移动的智能体，通过目标条件离线强化学习框架，利用三次样条插值将稀疏标注转换为密集奖励信号，结合观察编码器捕捉局部空间线索和长期时间动态，采用保守Q学习与行为克隆正则化进行稳定优化。

Result: 在包含50名患者1,158条轨迹的肾脏伤口缝合数据集上，SutureAgent相比最强基线将平均位移误差降低了58.6%。

Conclusion: 将针轨迹预测建模为像素级序列动作学习是有效的，能够更好地捕捉针运动的连续性并建模物理上合理的像素级状态转移。

Abstract: Predicting surgical needle trajectories from endoscopic video is critical for robot-assisted suturing, enabling anticipatory planning, real-time guidance, and safer motion execution. Existing methods that directly learn motion distributions from visual observations tend to overlook the sequential dependency among adjacent motion steps. Moreover, sparse waypoint annotations often fail to provide sufficient supervision, further increasing the difficulty of supervised or imitation learning methods. To address these challenges, we formulate image-based needle trajectory prediction as a sequential decision-making problem, in which the needle tip is treated as an agent that moves step by step in pixel space. This formulation naturally captures the continuity of needle motion and enables the explicit modeling of physically plausible pixel-wise state transitions over time. From this perspective, we propose SutureAgent, a goal-conditioned offline reinforcement learning framework that leverages sparse annotations to dense reward signals via cubic spline interpolation, encouraging the policy to exploit limited expert guidance while exploring plausible future motion paths. SutureAgent encodes variable-length clips using an observation encoder to capture both local spatial cues and long-range temporal dynamics, and autoregressively predicts future waypoints through actions composed of discrete directions and continuous magnitudes. To enable stable offline policy optimization from expert demonstrations, we adopt Conservative Q-Learning with Behavioral Cloning regularization. Experiments on a new kidney wound suturing dataset containing 1,158 trajectories from 50 patients show that SutureAgent reduces Average Displacement Error by 58.6% compared with the strongest baseline, demonstrating the effectiveness of modeling needle trajectory prediction as pixel-level sequential action learning.

</details>


### [298] [Why Cognitive Robotics Matters: Lessons from OntoAgent and LLM Deployment in HARMONIC for Safety-Critical Robot Teaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26730)
*Sanjay Oruganti,Sergei Nirenburg,Marjorie McShane,Jesse English,Michael Roberts,Christian Arndt,Ramviyas Parasuraman,Luis Sentis*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HARMONIC认知机器人架构将OntoAgent（基于本体的认知架构）与模块化反应层结合，通过用六个LLM替代OntoAgent进行对比实验，发现LLM在自我知识状态评估、诊断推理和动作选择方面存在系统性缺陷，支持认知架构在物理机器人系统中保持主要推理权威的设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在物理世界中部署具身AI代理需要可靠、确定性和透明的长时程规划认知能力。现有基于LLM的方法在自我监控、诊断推理和动作选择方面存在系统性缺陷，需要评估认知架构与LLM在相同机器人系统中的性能差异。

Method: 提出HARMONIC认知机器人架构，将OntoAgent（基于本体的认知架构）与模块化反应层配对。设计实验让六个前沿和高效LLM在协作维护场景中替代OntoAgent，在原生和知识均衡条件下进行功能评估。

Result: LLM无法一致地评估自身知识状态后再行动，导致诊断推理和动作选择的下游失败。即使在拥有相同程序性知识的情况下，这些缺陷仍然存在，表明问题是架构性的而非知识性的。

Conclusion: 研究结果支持在物理具身系统中让认知架构保留主要推理权威的设计，因为认知架构具有确定性和透明性特征，而LLM在这些关键认知能力上存在系统性缺陷。

Abstract: Deploying embodied AI agents in the physical world demands cognitive capabilities for long-horizon planning that execute reliably, deterministically, and transparently. We present HARMONIC, a cognitive-robotic architecture that pairs OntoAgent, a content-centric cognitive architecture providing metacognitive self-monitoring, domain-grounded diagnosis, and consequence-based action selection over ontologically structured knowledge, with a modular reactive tactical layer. HARMONIC's modular design enables a functional evaluation of whether LLMs can replicate OntoAgent's cognitive capabilities, evaluated within the same robotic system under identical conditions. Six LLMs spanning frontier and efficient tiers replace OntoAgent in a collaborative maintenance scenario under native and knowledge-equalized conditions. Results reveal that LLMs do not consistently assess their own knowledge state before acting, causing downstream failures in diagnostic reasoning and action selection. These deficits persist even with equivalent procedural knowledge, indicating the issues are architectural rather than knowledge-based. These findings support the design of physically embodied systems in which cognitive architectures retain primary authority for reasoning, owing to their deterministic and transparent characteristics.

</details>


### [299] [Motion as a Sensing Modality for Metric Scale in Monocular Visual-Inertial Odometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26740)
*Hadush Hailu,Bruk Gebregziabher*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文分析了单目视觉惯性里程计(VIO)中度量尺度恢复的轨迹依赖性问题，指出平移加速度（由曲率产生）而非匀速直线运动是尺度与惯性状态耦合的根本来源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单目VIO无法仅从视觉恢复度量尺度，尺度必须通过惯性测量来解决。现有研究对轨迹如何影响尺度可观测性的理解不足，需要建立理论框架来指导轨迹设计以改善尺度恢复。

Method: 1) 进行轨迹依赖的可观测性分析，形式化重力-加速度不对称性在IMU模型中的作用；2) 推导可观性矩阵的秩条件；3) 提出基于原始IMU数据的轻量级激励度量；4) 在差速驱动机器人上使用单目摄像头和消费级IMU进行控制实验验证。

Result: 实验验证了理论：直线运动产生9.2%尺度误差，圆周运动6.4%，八字形运动4.8%，激励度量跨越四个数量级。轨迹设计能有效改善度量尺度恢复。

Conclusion: 平移加速度（由曲率产生）是尺度与惯性状态耦合的根本来源，轨迹设计是改善度量尺度恢复的实用机制。提出的轻量级激励度量可直接从原始IMU数据计算，为实际应用提供了指导。

Abstract: Monocular visual-inertial odometry (VIO) cannot recover metric scale from vision alone; scale must be resolved through inertial measurements. We present a trajectory-dependent observability analysis showing that translational acceleration, produced by curvature, not constant-speed straight-line travel, is the fundamental source that couples scale to the inertial state. This relationship is formalized through the gravity-acceleration asymmetry in the IMU model, from which we derive rank conditions on the observability matrix and propose a lightweight excitation metric computable from raw IMU data. Controlled experiments on a differential-drive robot with a monocular camera and consumer-grade IMU validate the theory, with straight-line motion yielding 9.2% scale error, circular motion 6.4%, and figure-eight motion 4.8%, with excitation spanning four orders of magnitude. These results establish trajectory design as a practical mechanism for improving metric scale recovery.

</details>


### [300] [LARD 2.0: Enhanced Datasets and Benchmarking for Autonomous Landing Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26748)
*Yassine Bougacha,Geoffrey Delhomme,Mélanie Ducoffe,Augustin Fuchs,Jean-Brice Ginestet,Jacques Girard,Sofiane Kraiem,Franck Mamalet,Vincent Mussot,Claire Pagetti,Thierry Sammour*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文通过增强数据集多样性、改进操作设计域以及建立ML模型基准测试框架，解决了自主着陆系统中目标检测的监督训练数据限制问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主着陆系统中机器学习模型监督训练面临数据集限制，现有数据集生成器覆盖范围有限，无法满足复杂多跑道机场等现实场景的需求。

Method: 1) 增加BingMap航空图像和飞行模拟器等新数据源以扩展数据集多样性 2) 改进操作设计域，解决不现实的着陆场景并扩展到多跑道机场 3) 建立ML模型基准测试框架，评估复杂多实例环境下的目标检测性能

Result: 开发了改进的数据集生成方法，建立了更全面的基准测试框架，并提供了开源模型作为AI模型性能的基线。

Conclusion: 通过增强数据集生成、改进操作设计域和建立评估框架，为自主着陆系统的目标检测模型开发提供了更全面的解决方案和基准。

Abstract: This paper addresses key challenges in the development of autonomous landing systems, focusing on dataset limitations for supervised training of Machine Learning (ML) models for object detection. Our main contributions include: (1) Enhancing dataset diversity, by advocating for the inclusion of new sources such as BingMap aerial images and Flight Simulator, to widen the generation scope of an existing dataset generator used to produce the dataset LARD; (2) Refining the Operational Design Domain (ODD), addressing issues like unrealistic landing scenarios and expanding coverage to multi-runway airports; (3) Benchmarking ML models for autonomous landing systems, introducing a framework for evaluating object detection subtask in a complex multi-instances setting, and providing associated open-source models as a baseline for AI models' performance.

</details>


### [301] [Functionalization of Situated Robots via Vapour](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26752)
*Kadri-Ann Pankratov,Leonid Zinatullin,Adele Metsniit,Marie Vihmar,Indrek Must*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 利用环境材料功能化原位纺丝结构，减少有效载荷并实现与环境匹配


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在复杂环境中，机器人需要与环境紧密匹配。原位构建身体的机器人（如纺丝）能够利用环境，但功能化这些结构面临挑战：多材料纺丝需要复杂的纺丝头复用，混合物掺杂受添加剂可用性和化学稳定性限制。

Method: 提出利用环境中的材料功能化原位纺丝结构。通过两种活化剂递送策略：1）将液体注入预制网中，2）在纺丝混合物中预嵌入活化剂。以PVDF纤维网为例，通过暴露于吡咯蒸气转化为光学吸收的聚吡咯接枝结构。

Result: 成功将光学散射的PVDF纤维网转化为光学吸收的聚吡咯接枝结构，证明了利用环境材料功能化原位纺丝结构的可行性。

Conclusion: 利用环境材料功能化原位纺丝结构可以减少有效载荷并实现与环境的独特匹配。这一概念可扩展到更广泛的应用，包括利用细菌基因组在生物混合机器人中合成特定生物分子。

Abstract: Tight matching with the environment is key to effective robot operation in complex settings. Situated robots that build their bodies in situ (e.g. by spinning) are uniquely positioned to exploit their surroundings, yet functionalization of these structures remains an integration challenge - multimaterial spinning requires complex spinneret multiplexing, and mixture doping is limited by additive availability and chemical stability. We propose instead using materials available in the environment to functionalize in situ spun webs, reducing payload and uniquely matching the structure to its surroundings. As a demonstration, we transform an optically scattering PVDF fiber web into an optically absorbing, polypyrrole-grafted structure via pyrrole vapour exposure. Two activator-delivery strategies are shown: liquid infusion into a prefabricated web, and activator pre-embedding in the spinning mixture. Beyond this proof-of-concept, we foresee broader applications including biohybrid robots that exploit bacterial genomes for specific biomolecule synthesis in situ.

</details>


### [302] [Reasoning Systems for Semantic Navigation in Mobile Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26753)
*Jonathan Crespo,Ramón Barber,O. M. Mozos,Daniel Beßler,Michael Beetz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文提出了两种基于本体模型的语义导航系统解决方案，分别使用关系数据库和KnowRob实现，并进行了定性和定量比较


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语义导航能够考虑环境语义概念及其关系来规划机器人路径，便于与人类交互并理解人类环境中的导航目标和任务，这需要环境语义表示和推理系统两个主要组件

Method: 提出了两种实现语义导航的系统：第一个使用关系数据库，第二个基于KnowRob，两者都实现了本体模型，并集成到语义导航器中

Result: 在移动机器人上实现了概念验证，并对两种系统进行了定性和定量比较

Conclusion: 两种基于本体模型的语义导航系统都能有效实现语义导航，通过比较展示了各自的优势和特点
